message:
fix: repair 12 LabRuntime test regressions from asupersync 0.2.9 upgrade

- Add explicit scheduler.schedule(task_id, 0) after create_task (required
  since 0.2.9 no longer auto-schedules created tasks)
- Replace budget_sleep/budget_timeout with Time::ZERO now parameter with
  sleep_with_cx/timeout_with_cx which use cx_timer_now (Time::ZERO causes
  immediate return after first sleep since virtual time has advanced)
- Update backpressure channel test to verify FIFO ordering instead of
  capacity() semantics which changed in asupersync 0.2.9
- Fix dispatch_event precancelled cx test: reserve() now returns Cancelled
  (Closed) instead of timing out (Backpressure) — accept either
- Fix mux_client.rs partial move: add ref to reason binding in matches!

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
